whoWeAre.title: The Team
whoWeAre.description: Hello! We're Nico and Miguel, the developers behind FriendlyBet. ⚽
whoWeAre.background: We're both fans of sports and computer science. Our love for coding and sports brought us together to build this.
whoWeAre.relationship: Father and son — both engineers. Nico is still working his way through university.

whyCreated.title: Why We Built This
whyCreated.purpose: We built FriendlyBet to level up our React and Python skills while making something actually fun.
whyCreated.goal: The goal: a simple, enjoyable app you can play with friends and family.
whyCreated.usage: Predict match scores, compete in private rooms, and see who knows their sport best.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: FriendlyBet is a sports prediction platform where you compete with friends and colleagues in a friendly, private environment.

step1.title: Create or Join a Room
step1.description: Create a private room and invite friends, or join one with a code

step2.title: Make Predictions
step2.description: Predict match scores before kick-off — no changes once it starts

step3.title: Earn Points
step3.description: Score points for exact results or correct outcomes

step4.title: Climb the Ranking
step4.description: Points accumulate per room — compete to reach the top

scoring.title: Scoring System
scoring.description: Points are awarded after each match result is confirmed. You must place your prediction before the match kicks off.
scoring.exactScoreDesc: You predicted the exact final scoreline
scoring.winnerDesc: Right winner or draw, but wrong score
scoring.rankingDesc: Points accumulate across all predictions within a room. The ranking updates automatically after each match result. Compete consistently to stay at the top — every match counts.

underTheHood.title: Tech Stack
underTheHood.description: A peek at what powers this app:
underTheHood.futurePlans: We plan to add AI-powered match insights and predictions.
underTheHood.additionalSports: More sports coming: expanded Tennis and NBA support.

socialFeatures.title: Social Features
socialFeatures.description: Chat with room members, share strategies, and enjoy the competition in real time.

joinGame.title: Get in Touch
joinGame.description: Questions, feedback, or ideas? We'd love to hear from you.

reminder.fun: Have fun betting with your friends!
